_comment: Slow-moving factors with no public API. Update currentValue + asOf + events when a new Pew/Gallup/ADL/SPLC report drops (quarterly to yearly). oneYearMean/fiveYearMean anchor the backfilled history trajectory. Values are 0-100.

events.text: House passes party-line voting bill on near-zero crossover.
Pew tracking poll records widest issue-position gap in survey history.
Two state legislatures pass dueling laws on the same federal issue within 48 hours.
Gallup: trust in Supreme Court hits a new survey low.
Three of seven major institutions polled fall below 20% confidence.
Pew: 71% say neither party governs in the public interest.
Pew: share calling the other party 'a threat to the nation' reaches new high in both parties.
Survey records record-low willingness to live near opposing partisans.
Affective polarization index ticks up for the eleventh straight quarter.
ADL reports 14% rise in organized extremist incidents year-over-year.
Three militia-linked arrests across two states in one week.
SPLC adds 22 new hate-group entries in annual update.

historicalAnalogues.label: Pre-Civil War
historicalAnalogues.note: The final year before secession and war.

historicalAnalogues.label: Great Depression
historicalAnalogues.note: Economic collapse drove the deepest realignment of the 20th century.
Assassinations, riots, anti-war revolt; institutional trust in free-fall.

historicalAnalogues.label: Watergate
historicalAnalogues.note: Trust in government cratered after the resignation of a president.

historicalAnalogues.label: Mid-1990s
historicalAnalogues.note: Militia movement peak; Oklahoma City bombing.

historicalAnalogues.label: Financial Crisis
historicalAnalogues.note: Economic stress with rising partisan animosity.
